category_sources: source_facts.description says TUI for Jujutsu; official GitHub README says jjui is a terminal UI for working with the Jujutsu version control system.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is Jujutsu UI and identifies the binary as jjui; source_facts.name is jjui.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features and links detailed usage pages hosted under idursun.github.io/jjui.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/idursun/jjui; repo returned null per instruction not to second-guess existing repo values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository topics/README identify jjui as a Go-based TUI for Jujutsu version control.
